content: Fix `buildBaseCard` in analyzeCard to propagate source fingerprints + filename + sizeBytes + isDuplicate from the original draft card
Simplify `handleBulkUpload` — drop the setTimeout(0)/saveAllRef race in favor of direct `setPendingAutoSave(true)`
Sanity check: esbuild compile + ESLint clean
Verify fix via testing agent (code review + backend API check) — 13 items post-patch confirmed carrying source_sha256
